mapper.sql: id, user_id, title, content, category, tags, view_count, favorite_count, answer_count, is_resolved, `status`, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM qa_question WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND `status` != 'DELETED' ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qa_question WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND `status` != 'DELETED'
SELECT FROM qa_question WHERE `status` = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO qa_question (user_id, title, content, category, tags, `status`, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{category}, #{tags}, 'ACTIVE', #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE qa_question SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: UPDATE qa_question SET `status` = 'DELETED', update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
